name: Task Create
description: Create a sub-task and dispatch it to an agent or sub-agent. Fields: title*, description, assigned_agent_id, priority (low|medium|high|critical, default medium), blocked_by (list of task IDs), checklist, position, parent_id.

args.name: assigned_agent_id
args.description: Agent id to delegate to (omit to keep in this chat).

args.name: agent_persona
args.description: Persona key to spawn a sub-agent with, instead of an explicit agent id.

args.name: blocked_by
args.description: Task ids that must finish first.

args.name: parent_id
args.description: Parent task id for a subtask.

args.name: model_profile_id
args.description: Model profile to run the assigned agent with.
